title: aspidium duriusculum
intro: Aspidium duriusculum, also known as the Rough Wood Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Aspleniaceae. The Rough Wood Fern has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Aspidium duriusculum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
